since_last: 54% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.47%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.89% · BTC -2.71% · Gold -1.96% · Nasdaq100 +1.95%. 54% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.47%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.47%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.86%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +8.66%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +8.66%, SMCI +7.92%, KLAC +7.81%, INTC +7.75%, AMAT +7.46%. Laggards: INOD -8.66%, IBM -6.47%, SPCX -6.15%, MDB -5.48%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.15% at $180.03
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.15% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
